---
name: Course recipe
about: Share a successful agent invocation that built a great vault for a specific course type
title: "[RECIPE] "
labels: recipe
assignees: ''
---

## Course type

E.g., *Statistics for Business (BSc, time-series-heavy, oral exam)* or *Cell Biology (MSc, image-heavy, written exam)*.

## What worked

The Phase 1 intake answers that produced the best result:

- Course: ___
- Purpose: ___
- Priority topics: ___
- Exam format: ___
- Lecture format: Study Sheet / Detailed Notes
- Depth: lean / standard / thorough
- Language: ___
- Sources: (types and counts, e.g., 11 PDFs + 4 .ipynb)

## Output stats

- Total notes generated: ___
- Concepts per lecture (density): ___
- Pre-exam usefulness rating (1–10): ___

## Recommended customisations

Any tweaks you made to the agent or template files for your course's quirks.

## What didn't work

Issues you ran into and how you worked around them.

## Sample notes

(Optional) A representative concept note or lecture sheet from your vault — with personal info redacted — that shows the recipe's typical output quality.
